name: index generation: --emit-index always rewrites the file (per "auto-regenerated per source folder file change"); old INDEX.md is replaced not appended
command:
mkdir -p tree/google tree/_meta && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > tree/google/x.yaml && echo "STALE CONTENT" > tree/_meta/INDEX.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-index "$PWD/tree/_meta/INDEX.md" && ! grep "STALE CONTENT" tree/_meta/INDEX.md && echo ok 1>&2
